name: orchestray
description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code

scripts.test: node --require ./tests/helpers/setup.js --test tests/*.test.js tests/helpers/*.test.js tests/hooks/*.test.js tests/mcp-server/*.test.js tests/mcp-server/lib/*.test.js tests/mcp-server/tools/*.test.js tests/mcp-server/resources/*.test.js tests/mcp-server/elicit/*.test.js tests/regression/*.test.js tests/telemetry/*.test.js tests/unit/*.test.js bin/_lib/__tests__/*.test.js bin/__tests__/*.test.js bin/mcp-server/tools/__tests__/*.test.js
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try { require('better-sqlite3') } catch (e) { console.warn('better-sqlite3 not available; FTS5 will be unavailable. Ensure build tools are present or use Node 22.5+'); }"

author: palginpav
